title: parity_scan_and_mvp_planner
description: Skill request spec for parity_scan_and_mvp_planner: scans the repo to build a capability parity matrix, identifies gaps, and produces a prioritized MVP pre-plan.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this skill request (for tracing and deduplication)

run_date.description: Date of the scan run (YYYY-MM-DD); used in output file names

scan_scope.description: List of directories to scan. If omitted, full repo is scanned.

reference_mvp_chain.description: Path to the MVP chain specification document

output_dir.description: Directory where parity matrix and backlog are written

generate_mvp_plan.description: Whether to also generate an M* pre-plan for the next milestone

mvp_plan_output_dir.description: Directory where the generated M* plan is written

outputs.description: skill_result_spec — populated by the skill after execution

parity_matrix.description: Absolute path to the written parity matrix file

backlog.description: Absolute path to the written missing features backlog file

mvp_plan.description: Absolute path to the written M* pre-plan (null if generate_mvp_plan is false)

gap_count.description: Total number of GAP items found in the parity matrix

partial_count.description: Total number of PARTIAL items found in the parity matrix

full_count.description: Total number of FULL items found in the parity matrix

p1_count.description: Number of P1-priority (high leverage) backlog items

p2_count.description: Number of P2-priority (standard improvements) backlog items

status.description: Execution status: ok = all outputs written successfully; partial = some outputs written; error = failure

errors.description: List of error messages if status is 'error' or 'partial'
